# /plan

> Produce the feature plan in the L1-L4 hierarchy used by the ALM agent for ADO/JIRA round-trip.

## Hierarchy

- **L1 Epic** — one per feature (the whole CE feature)
- **L2 Feature/Capability** — one per sub-platform area in scope (e.g., model-driven, canvas, pages, pcf, power-automate)
- **L3 User Story** — one per FR; preserves spec FR-NN id in title
- **L4 Task** — implementation atom (3-8h target); fully detailed by `/task`

## Usage

```
/plan [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>]
```

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/features/{f}/spec.md` (gate `SPEC_APPROVED` APPROVED)
- `project.config.yaml` for prefixes + module-mapping
- [templates/plan.template.md](../../templates/plan.template.md)

## Execution flow

1. Resolve feature; assert spec exists and `SPEC_APPROVED` is APPROVED.
2. Generate L1 Epic from spec §1 (Business context) + §2 (Personas).
3. Generate L2 Features from sub-platform breakdown:
   - One L2 per in-scope sub-platform (per `project.config.yaml` modelDriven/canvas/powerPages/pcf/powerAutomate)
   - L2 title includes the sub-platform name
4. Generate L3 User Stories from spec §3 (Functional requirements). Each FR-NN becomes one L3.
5. Generate L4 Task placeholders from spec §3 ACs + the customization inventory in [constitution/00-charter.md § Customization inventory](../../constitution/00-charter.md). Actual L4 detail is filled by `/task`.
6. Render [templates/plan.template.md](../../templates/plan.template.md) into `projects/{p}/d365-ce/features/{f}/plan.md`.
7. Update `.workflow.json`: `currentStates` += `PLAN_DRAFT`; `gate PLAN_CLARIFIED.status=PENDING`.

## Output

- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/features/{f}/plan.md`
- `.workflow.json` updated
